characters.name: 50's Morgan
characters.description: 50's Morganwas a daddy's girl who loved to hoola-hoop in 1957. Her duty towards her government was greater than that to her family, because the first thing that she did when she sees thatCory Matthewsis allegedly a spy was to tell her daddy,Tom Bosley.

characters.name: 50's Morgan
characters.description: 50's Morganwas a daddy's girl who loved to hoola-hoop in 1957. Her duty towards her government was greater than that to her family, because the first thing that she did when she sees thatCory Matthewsis allegedly a spy was to tell her daddy,Tom Bosley.

characters.name: 50s Eric
characters.description: 50s Ericis a student atJohn Adams Highin 1957 destined for either Harvard orYale. He is a self-described "Harvard genius and future captain of industry." Like50's Feeny, he is very sure thatCory Matthewsis a Russian spy.

characters.name: 50s Eric
characters.description: 50s Ericis a student atJohn Adams Highin 1957 destined for either Harvard orYale. He is a self-described "Harvard genius and future captain of industry." Like50's Feeny, he is very sure thatCory Matthewsis a Russian spy.

characters.name: 50s Feeny
characters.description: 50's Feenyis best noted for his distaste forShawnzie Hunterelli, the "bad boy" atJohn Adams Highin 1957. In fact, he gladly expels him for merely saying the word "butt." He also is the first to accuseCory Matthewsof being a Russian spy.

characters.name: 50s Feeny
characters.description: 50's Feenyis best noted for his distaste forShawnzie Hunterelli, the "bad boy" atJohn Adams Highin 1957. In fact, he gladly expels him for merely saying the word "butt." He also is the first to accuseCory Matthewsof being a Russian spy.

characters.name: 50s Turner
characters.description: 50s Turneris the teacher ofShawnzie Hunterelli,T.L., andCory Matthewsin 1957. He is very timid and scared, which doesn't bode well on his first day at school. Luckily, Shawnzie helps him out by snapping his fingers to make the class settle down. When Cory tells him of the future, Turner does not believe him. He is, however, intrigued by pizza with cheese baked into the crust. He is also enraged when Cory says the word "butt," mocking his civil defense drills (from a nuclear bomb), immediately assuming thatShawnzie Hunterelliis to blame. Whenever he yells "FLASH!", everyone drops to the floor as though it is a nuclear bomb.

characters.name: 50s Turner
characters.description: 50s Turneris the teacher ofShawnzie Hunterelli,T.L., andCory Matthewsin 1957. He is very timid and scared, which doesn't bode well on his first day at school. Luckily, Shawnzie helps him out by snapping his fingers to make the class settle down. When Cory tells him of the future, Turner does not believe him. He is, however, intrigued by pizza with cheese baked into the crust. He is also enraged when Cory says the word "butt," mocking his civil defense drills (from a nuclear bomb), immediately assuming thatShawnzie Hunterelliis to blame. Whenever he yells "FLASH!", everyone drops to the floor as though it is a nuclear bomb.

characters.name: Adam
characters.description: Adam Adamis an eccentric yet rich student atPennbrook, who finds he can never keep a roommate for more than a few days. He keeps furniture in which family members have died, and gets upset if anyone sits there. He occasionally will pick up the phone and call someone sitting right next to him, and refuse to speak directly to them, instead speaking into the phone as though both people are far apart. He keeps a taxidermy parrot named Nelly as a pet, pretending that she speaks to him. It is also implied he keeps his dead family members in his closet. InThe Psychotic Episode,Ericmoves in with him. Eric puts up with his odd behavior because of the very attractive female neighbor,Sheilawho often drops by, but he freaks out and leaves when Adam takes out Nelly. Later, Eric decides the girl is worth it, and stays until Adam suggests he meets his mother, who he had previously mentioned was dead.

characters.name: Alexandra
characters.description: Alexandra To see the artist who appeared inBetter Than the Average Cory,click here Alexandrawas an aquatics expert atDisney Worldwho worked at the Living Sea Pavilion. She explained to the tour (which containedTopanga,Ronnie Waterman, andKristen Hoffman) aboutAmber, a dolphin who didn't eat because she'd lost her mate.

characters.name: Truckstop Girls
characters.description: Truckstop Girls TheTruckstop GirlsareAmy Sue,Sarah,Stacy, andAli. The work at a truckstop forBill, who is a father to Amy Sue and Sarah and is like a father to Stacy and Ali. They're very friendly and cordial toCoryandShawn, but would like to try singing professionally. Because Bill won't allow it, they ask Cory and Shawn to help them convince Bill. They also sing a song at the truck stop, which greatly impresses Cory. Amy Sue (fourth from left, next to Cory) is the first to speak Cory and Shawn. Sarah (far left) was said to have made a great girlfriend for Shawn, according toChet. Ali (third from left) knows that Shawn is looking for something, peering "into his soul," as Cory says. Stacy (far right) pours the boys coffee.

characters.name: Alicia
characters.description: AliciaAliciawas a member of the Centre, a cult that consisted of teenagers that felt very lost, as if they didn't belong anywhere. She greetedCoryandEric Matthewswhen they went to the Centre to getShawn Hunter. Eric followed Alicia because she was attractive, not because he believed in the cult's ideas.

characters.name: Amish Jack
characters.description: Amish Jackis the identityJackassumed when he went into hiding after becoming unable to pay $6,000 to a bookie. Jack began to feel as though he could stay with the Amish for good, and start a new life. Unfortunately, he tookEricwith him, who was unable to keep his hormones in check. When the Amish people started throwing pitchforks, they both ran for it.

characters.name: Truckstop Girls
characters.description: Truckstop Girls TheTruckstop GirlsareAmy Sue,Sarah,Stacy, andAli. The work at a truckstop forBill, who is a father to Amy Sue and Sarah and is like a father to Stacy and Ali. They're very friendly and cordial toCoryandShawn, but would like to try singing professionally. Because Bill won't allow it, they ask Cory and Shawn to help them convince Bill. They also sing a song at the truck stop, which greatly impresses Cory. Amy Sue (fourth from left, next to Cory) is the first to speak Cory and Shawn. Sarah (far left) was said to have made a great girlfriend for Shawn, according toChet. Ali (third from left) knows that Shawn is looking for something, peering "into his soul," as Cory says. Stacy (far right) pours the boys coffee.

characters.name: Angel Nuffsaid
characters.description: Angelis theNoir worldalternate personality ofAngela. She is a ditsy waitress atRory's Shangri-La Café, constantly dropping dishes and laughing, "There I go again!"[1]

characters.name: Angel Nuffsaid
characters.description: Angelis theNoir worldalternate personality ofAngela. She is a ditsy waitress atRory's Shangri-La Café, constantly dropping dishes and laughing, "There I go again!"[1]

characters.name: Anita
characters.description: Anita AnitaaskedJeff Lacyabout his car while Jeff studied withEric. The question was enough to distract Jeff and abruptly end the tutoring session. According to Eric, she, Jeff, and him all went cruising around in the car all evening with another girl in Eric's lap.

characters.name: Another Professor
characters.description: Another Professor This professor, referred to asAnother Professor, is a colleague of thephysics professor. He is annoyed that his meeting with his colleague is delayed, but his complaints are very gibberish toCory.

characters.name: Kelly Aragon
characters.description: Kelly AragonFull nameKelly AragonGenderfemaleFamilyUnnamed HusbandSamantha (daughter)First seenThe Honeymoon is OverLast seenPicket Fences Kelly Aragonis the woman who lived next toCoryandTopangawhen they lived in the married couple dorm. She is portrayed by Marisol Nichols.

characters.name: Arnie Heck
characters.description: Arnie HeckArnie Heckwas a guest that stayed atShawn HunterandCory Matthews's makeshift Bed and Breakfest. Arnie and his wife were visiting from Boca. Arnie did not want to stay at the B & B at first, considering it "foofy", but stayed because his wife wanted to pick where they stayed for once. He appeared to have a grumpy attitude, but then was shown enthusiastically singing "By The Silvery Moon" by Doris Day with his wife, Cory, Topanga, and the Timmers, displaying a more fun side to him. He comments to Cory that he is lucky to have Topanga.

characters.name: Arthur (student)
characters.description: Arthur (student) Arthurwas a straight-A student atJohn Adams High. His films garnered multiple film-festival honors and he's apparently friends with Ted Turner, who gave him a written recommendation for an internship atWIXB. He was very impressive at the interview, winning many kudos fromSonja Cannon, an important executive at the station. His resumé was many pages long. Knowing he was likely to get the internship, Arthur toldEriche could walk in without pants and still get the job. Unfortunately for him, Eric got the job because he impressedPat Darby, the president of the station, with his work ethic.

characters.name: Arthur Kandib
characters.description: Arthur KandibArthur "Artie K" Kandib, PhDwas the host ofSpring Fever, a quiz show previously known asHigh School Quiz Show. He was replaced withKikias the show continued to tweak its image toward popular culture.Cory Matthews,Topanga Lawrence, andShawn Hunterwere all contestants on this show.

characters.name: Auggie Matthews
characters.description: Auggie Matthews August "Auggie" Matthewsis the younger child ofCoryandTopanga Matthewsand is the younger brother ofRiley. Mother:Topanga Lawrence-MatthewsFather:Cory MatthewsSiblings:Riley Matthews(sister)Grandmothers:Amy Matthews(paternal) andRhiannon Lawrence(maternal)Grandfathers:Alan Matthews(paternal) andJedidiah Lawrence(maternal)Uncles:Eric Matthews(paternal) andJoshua Matthews(paternal)Aunts:Morgan Matthews(paternal)

characters.name: Auggie Matthews
characters.description: Auggie Matthews August "Auggie" Matthewsis the younger child ofCoryandTopanga Matthewsand is the younger brother ofRiley. Mother:Topanga Lawrence-MatthewsFather:Cory MatthewsSiblings:Riley Matthews(sister)Grandmothers:Amy Matthews(paternal) andRhiannon Lawrence(maternal)Grandfathers:Alan Matthews(paternal) andJedidiah Lawrence(maternal)Uncles:Eric Matthews(paternal) andJoshua Matthews(paternal)Aunts:Morgan Matthews(paternal)

characters.name: Aunt Lucy
characters.description: Virna Hunter'sAunt Lucyis daffy, according toChetinTurkey Day.

characters.name: Natives
characters.description: Natives Ookie,Babookie, andFadookieare three islanders onCoryandTopanga's honeymoon. They're all overweight, glasses-wearing, caucasians that speak with a midwestern accent. They want Cory to run for mayor of the island, because he is very popular and they think he can win. He also desperately wants Cory to win, because the opposition is communists. They also attempt to cookEric(with permission) in a giant cauldron.

characters.name: Teddy "Beanbag" Bagwell
characters.description: Teddy "Beanbag" Bagwell Teddy "Beanbag" Bagwellis a baseball player that was 2 hit-by-pitches away from the all-time record. After getting hit once more, though, a stretcher was required and Bagwell announced to the crowd, "Today I consider myself the stupidest man on the face of the Earth. I quit baseball." Erichad bought a signed photo of Bagwell for $200 shortly before his retirement, in hopes that the value would skyrocket when Bagwell surpassed the all-time hit-by-pitch record. When Bagwell announced his impromptu retirement, Eric was greatly disheartened.

characters.name: Barbara
characters.description: BarbaraGenderFemaleHair colorBlondeFriendsPaigeSchoolJefferson ElementaryFirst seen"Cory's Alternative Friends"Last seen"Cory's Alternative Friends"Portrayed byMegan Parlen Barbarawas a former student atJefferson Elementary. Barbara andPaigeare partnered up for a project inMr. Feeny's class, where they give a presentation on how the products humans use in their every day lives caused algae to grow in lakes, which could cut off oxygen and disrupt the ecosystem. They use visual aids in their performance, including Barbara dipping a fake fish into a beaker and then pulling out a fake fish skeleton. Mr. Feeny then commends them for their report, calling it excellent, and praises them for including visuals. During lunch, Paige speaks with Barbara about not inviting a specific boy to her party. Barbara then asks Paige what was wrong with him, and Paige replies that she found him gross and that he was a "Brillo head". A few days later, she and Paige are confronted by Cory, who indicates that he wouldn't have attended the party and that they shouldn't talk about people like that, and Barbara tells him that they were not talking about him and that they never talk about him, citing that they aren't bored enough to do so.[1]

characters.name: Baseball Announcer
characters.description: Baseball Announcer InThe Last Temptation of Cory, thebaseball announcernarrates the final at-bat and retirement speech ofTeddy "Beanbag" Bagwell. He's very surprised that Bagwell asked for a microphone from his stretcher, claiming he never saw anything like it. The Baseball Announcer is never shown, only heard.

characters.name: Jennifer Bassett
characters.description: Jennifer BassettFull nameJennifer Bassett-MinkusFamilyFarkle(son)First seenAn Affair to ForgetLast seenFirst Girlfriends Club(BMW)Girl Meets Farkle (GMW) Jennifer Bassettis a beautiful, but nasty girl who datedShawnfor a while before dumping him. When she heardCoryinsulting her, she sought revenge, and got back together with Shawn on the condition that he ‘break up’ with Cory. Shawn ultimately decided Cory is more important. Later, she and two of Shawn’s other ex-girlfriends kidnapped him to ‘hold him on trial’ for dumping them after swearing devotion. She likely did this as revenge for the previous engagement. She was accused by Cory to 'really be a guy'. To which she responds, "so?"

characters.name: Jennifer Bassett
characters.description: Jennifer BassettFull nameJennifer Bassett-MinkusFamilyFarkle(son)First seenAn Affair to ForgetLast seenFirst Girlfriends Club(BMW)Girl Meets Farkle (GMW) Jennifer Bassettis a beautiful, but nasty girl who datedShawnfor a while before dumping him. She was accused by Cory to 'really be a guy'. To which she responds, "so?"

characters.name: Becky Sparrow
characters.description: Becky SparrowBeckyis the sister ofRosie Sparrow. The two were foreign exchange students who were at John Adams High on a 6 month student visa. She and her sister went on a double date withCory MatthewsandShawn Hunter, the latter being her date. On their date, Becky and Shawn were all over each over, and were frequently making out. Later, Shawn told Cory that the Sparrow sisters wanted to see him and Cory again.

characters.name: Harry Beethoven
characters.description: Harry Beethovenis a man of whomWee Hawkin Willieis a direct descendant.[1]

characters.name: Ben Sandwich
characters.description: Ben Sandwichis the alternate version ofBen Savagein theBoy Meets Worlduniverse. He is arrogant, cruel, and mean. He often bullied hisKid Gets Acquainted with Universeco-starSchneider, whom he referred to as a "creepy weirdo," a "silent freak" and a "dead person." He is similar to Jack The Jerk. He plays Rory onKid Gets Acquainted with Universe. He has a brother named Bread Sandwich, who starred in a successful series himself. He is arrogant, cruel, and mean. He often bullied hisKid Gets Acquainted with Universeco-starSchneider, whom he referred to as a "creepy weirdo," a "silent freak" and a "dead person." He is similar to Jack The Jerk.

characters.name: Mrs. Bertelson
characters.description: Mrs. Bertelsonis a woman living in the same building as the apartment originally owned byJack. Tells Jack thatRachelis too tall for him.

characters.name: Beth
characters.description: BethBethwas the owner of the purse thatShawnfound. Shawn had fallen in love with the owner of the purse, before he met Beth, as he had discovered new interests in activities he had never given a chance to before. However, when finally meeting her atChubbie's, Shawn was devastated to see that she was alreadydating someone. However, Shawn was unaware that all of the items in the purse, which had made him fall in love, actually belonged toAngela Moore.

characters.name: Beth's Boyfriend
characters.description: Beth's BoyfriendBeth's Boyfriendwas the teenager that was seen huggingBethinI Love You, Donna Karan, which devastatedShawna lot, as he had put his hopes up for Beth after falling in love with the items in her purse. However, unbeknownst to Shawn, the items actually belonged toAngela Moore.

characters.name: Beverly
characters.description: BeverlyBeverlywas a girl thatShawnwent on one date with atChubbie's. She proclaimed that she could make a cheer out of everything, and made one out of Shawn's name, despite not being on the cheerleading team. She asked Shawn if he wanted to make out, and they accordingly did so untilCoryinterrupted to talk to Shawn.

characters.name: Lila Bolander
characters.description: Lila Bolander Lila Bolanderis the dean ofPennbrook University, and also teaches several classes there. She develops a friendship withCoryand the rest, although it never comes close to their friendships withMr. Feeny. She serves as a romantic interest for Mr. Feeny, as well.

characters.name: Boris
characters.description: Borisis the secret codename forAlanin the 1950's, who is a Russian spy. Although he seems like the epitomic American dad, Boris speaks with a thick Russian accent. Along withNatasha, he asksCoryfor papers on the American space program when Cory is in prison.

characters.name: Boris
characters.description: Borisis the secret codename forAlanin the 1950's, who is a Russian spy. Although he seems like the epitomic American dad, Boris speaks with a thick Russian accent. Along withNatasha, he asksCoryfor papers on the American space program when Cory is in prison.

characters.name: Tom Bosley
characters.description: Tom Bosleyis an actor best remembered for portraying Howard Cunningham onHappy Days, although he's also appeared on the notable TV showsMcMillan & Wife,The Love Boat, andPort Charles.

characters.name: Tom Bosley
characters.description: Tom Bosleyis an actor best remembered for portraying Howard Cunningham onHappy Days, although he's also appeared on the notable TV showsMcMillan & Wife,The Love Boat, andPort Charles.

characters.name: Mark Braithwaite
characters.description: Mark BraithwaitewasAmy's boyfriend before she datedAlan. He took her out to dinner atChez Lafleurand proposed to her, but she declined.[1]

characters.name: Brenda Hibbard
characters.description: You can help Boy Meets Wiki byexpanding it Brenda Hibbard Brenda Hibbardis a pleasant lunch room lady who is friends with all 900 students atJohn Adams High School, who she refers to as "900 kids."  She dies suddenly in the episodeFishing for Virna.

characters.name: Brett McInerny
characters.description: Brett McInernyBrett McInernywas the sponser ofHuh! That's Cool, a quiz show previously known asKnowledge FeverandHigh School Quiz Show. As the show gained more success when geared toward pop culture, he wantedCory Matthews,Topanga Lawrence, andShawn Hunter, the champion team, to take six weeks off of school to go on a filming trip for the show. However, when the Cory, Shawn, and Topanga askedSusan Kallibackif they could add more educational material back to the show, Susan deliberately planted contestants that would defeat them, and who would cooperate with her and Brett about the trip.
